title: How to Do the Work
author: Nicole LePera
subline: Recognize your patterns. Heal from the past. Create the self.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A nested doll (matryoshka) — three concentric silhouettes, each smaller inside the next. The INNERMOST doll is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1500)" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif">
    <!-- OUTER doll -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2">
      <circle cx="0" cy="-200" r="100"/>
      <path d="M -60 -100 L -60 -40 L 60 -40 L 60 -100"/>
      <path d="M -260 -40 L -260 200 L -180 280 L -120 280 L -120 200 L 120 200 L 120 280 L 180 280 L 260 200 L 260 -40 L 240 0 Q 120 20 0 20 Q -120 20 -240 0 Z"/>
    </g>
    <!-- MIDDLE doll -->
    <g transform="translate(0 80) scale(0.7)" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2">
      <circle cx="0" cy="-200" r="100"/>
      <path d="M -60 -100 L -60 -40 L 60 -40 L 60 -100"/>
      <path d="M -260 -40 L -260 200 L -180 280 L -120 280 L -120 200 L 120 200 L 120 280 L 180 280 L 260 200 L 260 -40 L 240 0 Q 120 20 0 20 Q -120 20 -240 0 Z"/>
    </g>
    <!-- INNER doll: RED — the true self -->
    <g transform="translate(0 140) scale(0.45)" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2">
      <circle cx="0" cy="-200" r="100"/>
      <path d="M -60 -100 L -60 -40 L 60 -40 L 60 -100"/>
      <path d="M -260 -40 L -260 200 L -180 280 L -120 280 L -120 200 L 120 200 L 120 280 L 180 280 L 260 200 L 260 -40 L 240 0 Q 120 20 0 20 Q -120 20 -240 0 Z"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Whisper labels pointing to each -->
    <g font-size="14" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em">
      <text x="280" y="-200" text-anchor="start" fill="#cccccc">PERSONA</text>
      <text x="280" y="80" text-anchor="start" fill="#cccccc">WOUNDED SELF</text>
      <text x="280" y="220" text-anchor="start" fill="#fc1c46">TRUE SELF</text>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A matryoshka (nested doll): outer (persona, ash), middle (wounded self, ash), inner (true self, RED). 260px weight-500 title at the top — the work is peeling back to the core.
